name: structure
description: Configuration keywords for FLAC structural-element plot items. Use the concrete item type when known, such as beam, cable, shell, liner, pile, geogrid, or structure-node.

basic_keywords.description: Show a legend for color-mapped structural values.

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Color structural elements or nodes by group, component forces, moments, stress resultants, displacement, or system attributes.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create shell active on color-by text-attribute "group" 'Any' color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true legend active on
plot item create structure-node active on color-by vector-attribute "displacement" color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Continuous displacement color map for structural nodes.
